{{Infobox location
| name = Dornoth IV
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Dornoth IV Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth]] IV, also known as [[Dornoth]] Four, is the homeworld of the [[Lichborn]] species and is located within the [[Dornoth system]], which is part of the [[Galactic Union]]. The planet is characterized by extreme hostility and has been described as the worst inhabited planet in the galaxy. Its environment is shaped by its [[World Spirit]], who creates dangerous conditions such as acid clouds, sulfurous atmospheres, poison swamps, and venomous creatures to test those living there. The landscape is also noted for its toxic nature and is littered with the wreckage of early spacefaring vessels that remain largely unexplored due to these harsh conditions. Despite its dangers, the planet has a population of approximately one hundred million [[Lichborn]], while billions more reside on surrounding space stations. The [[Vallenar Corporation]] maintains a significant presence on the planet, and it serves as a location for various space-related activities, including salvage operations.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dornoth]] IV is a toxic landscape characterized by the presence of poisonous flames. The narrator spent their formative years growing up on this world. Throughout its surface, the planet is littered with the remains of early spacefaring vehicle wreckage. Additionally, [[Dornoth]] IV serves as a location that broadcasts [[Subline]] feeds.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dornoth IV]] is a toxic landscape.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator grew up on [[Dornoth]] Four.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dornoth]] Four is a planet with toxic flame.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dornoth IV]] is a planet that broadcasts [[Subline]] feeds.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dornoth IV]] is a planet littered with the wreckage of early spacefaring vehicles.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44" />}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dornoth IV]] is a location within [[Alliance space]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dornoth IV]] is a location where the [[Vallenar Corporation]] has a large presence.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Grand Hive]] appeared outside of [[Dornoth IV]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dornoth IV]] holds the title of 'worst planet in the galaxy' (referenced by [[Murrok]]).<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth]] IV is a world identified in security consultation notes as the homeworld of the [[Lichborn]]. The location serves as a destination for the eventual return of the [[Lichborn fleet]]. It is also the site of an orphanage where [[Sola]] and [[Ortila]] first met, and it remains the place where [[Sola]]'s relatives reside.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth IV]] is mentioned in a security consultation note.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth IV]] is the homeworld of the [[Lichborn]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth]] Four is a location the [[Lichborn fleet]] will return to.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth]] Four is the location of an orphanage where [[Sola]] and [[Ortila]] met.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sola]]'s relatives live on [[Dornoth]] Four.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
